Read This First

  • runGenerator() in harness/app/actions/generate.ts is the top-level Superset action.
  • If HARNESS_GENERATOR_ARCH=actor, the harness enters runActorGenerator() and then orchestrateActorDirectorWithRetries().
  • Actor/Director candidates still run through deterministic validate() before being persisted, but not through validator-llm.ts.
  • If HARNESS_GENERATOR_ARCH is not actor, the old path calls generateForChannel() and normally gates with the active LLM validator.
  • validator-llm.ts and actor-director.ts are separate LLM classifiers. They now share the Infinex kernel and drive table, but their schemas and roles differ.

Harness Entry Points

Where Superset chooses the old generator/active-validator path or the Actor/Director path.

harness/app/actions/generate.ts

import { revalidatePath } from 'next/cache';
4
import { generate, type Candidate, type GenerationPromptCapture } from '@pipeline/generator';
5
import {
6
  orchestrateActorDirectorWithRetries,
7
  type ActorDirectorResult,
8
} from '@pipeline/actor-orchestrator';
9
import { parseActorWarmupMode } from '@pipeline/actor-director';
10
import {
11
  orchestrateActiveWithRetries,
12
  orchestrateWithRetries,
13
  type ActiveRetryOrchestrationResult,
14
} from '@pipeline/orchestrator';
15
import { parseReleaseCard } from '@pipeline/card';
16
import { validate } from '@pipeline/validator';
17
import type { BeatSequence } from '@pipeline/voice/types';
18
import type { HistoryGuardResult, ShippedCopyRecord } from '@pipeline/history-guards';
19
import type { ActiveValidationVerdict } from '@pipeline/validator-active';
20
import { classifyText } from '@/lib/classifier-wrapper';
21
import { getDb, newId, nowIso, writeTx } from '@/lib/db';
22
import { makeSemanticShifts, makeTextDiff } from '@/lib/diff';
23
import {
24
  expectedChannelsForCard,
25
  getReleaseCardJson,
26
  requireCard,
27
  requireCandidate,
28
} from '@/lib/queries';
29

30

interface CandidateAuditPersistence {
33
  active_validation_passed: boolean;
34
  active_audit_json: string;
35
  history_guard_passed: boolean | null;
36
  history_guard_json: string | null;
37
}
38
39
interface AttemptPersistence {
40
  /** Orchestrator-level attempt number (1-indexed within this run). */
41
  orchestratorAttempt: number;
42
  /** Auto-feedback fed INTO this attempt (undefined for first attempt). */
43
  feedbackIn: string | undefined;
44
  /** Prompts the generator built for this attempt. Empty in stub mode. */
45
  capture: GenerationPromptCapture;
46
}

48
export async function runGenerator(
49
  card_id: string,
50
  channels?: Channel[],
51
  opts?: { n?: number; retry?: boolean },
52
): Promise<{ candidates_by_channel: Record<Channel, HarnessCandidate[]> }> {
53
  const db = getDb();
54
  const card = requireCard(card_id, db);
55
  if (!card.card_approved_at) {
56
    throw new Error('Card stage must be approved before running the generator.');
57
  }
58
  // Default to channels derived from the release card's audience, not all three
59
  const activeChannels = channels ?? expectedChannelsForCard(card_id, db);
60
  if (process.env.HARNESS_GENERATOR_ARCH === 'actor') {
61
    return runActorGenerator(card_id, activeChannels, opts?.n);
62
  }
63
  const batches = await Promise.all(
64
    activeChannels.map((channel) => generateForChannel(card_id, channel, opts?.n, undefined)),
65
  );
66
  const result: Record<Channel, HarnessCandidate[]> = {
67
    x: [],
68
    web: [],
69
    'in-product': [],
70
  };
71
  for (const batch of batches) result[batch.channel] = batch.candidates;
72
  revalidatePath(`/cards/${card_id}`);
73
  revalidatePath('/');
74
  return { candidates_by_channel: result };
75
}
76
77
export async function decideCandidate(
78
  candidate_id: string,
79
  action: CandidateDecision,
80
  payload?: { edited_text?: string; retry_feedback?: string; rejection_reason?: string },
81
): Promise<{ next_action: 'approved' | 'retry-queued' | 'rejected' }> {
82
  const db = getDb();
83
  const candidate = requireCandidate(candidate_id, db);
84
  const card = requireCard(candidate.card_id, db);
85
  const decidedAt = nowIso();
86
  const editedText = action === 'edit' ? payload?.edited_text?.trim() : undefined;
87
  const textDiff = editedText ? makeTextDiff(candidate.text, editedText, decidedAt) : null;
88
  const beforeAudit = action === 'edit' ? parseJson(candidate.beat_audit_json, []) : [];
89
  const afterAudit =
90
    action === 'edit' && editedText
91
      ? await classifyText(editedText, {
92
          voice: card.voice,
93
          beats: parseBeatSequence(candidate.declared_beats_json),
94
        })
95
      : [];
96
  const shifts = action === 'edit' ? makeSemanticShifts(beforeAudit, afterAudit) : [];
97
98
  const nextAction = writeTx(db, () => {
99
    db.prepare(
100
      `INSERT INTO candidate_decisions
101
         (id, candidate_id, action, edited_text, retry_feedback, rejection_reason, decided_at)
102
       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
103
    ).run(
104
      newId(),
105
      candidate_id,
106
      action,
107
      payload?.edited_text ?? null,
108
      payload?.retry_feedback ?? null,
109
      payload?.rejection_reason ?? null,
110
      decidedAt,
111
    );
112
113
    if (action === 'edit') {
114
      if (!editedText) throw new Error('edited_text is required for candidate edit decisions.');
115
      if (textDiff) {
116
        db.prepare(
117
          `INSERT INTO candidate_text_edits
118
             (id, candidate_id, before_text, after_text, word_diff_json, edited_at)
119
           VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
120
        ).run(
121
          newId(),
122
          candidate_id,
123
          textDiff.before_text,
124
          textDiff.after_text,
125
          textDiff.word_diff_json,
126
          textDiff.edited_at,
127
        );
128
      }
129
130
      db.prepare(
131
        `INSERT INTO candidate_semantic_edits
132
           (id, candidate_id, before_beat_audit_json, after_beat_audit_json, shifted_beats_json, edited_at)
133
         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
134
      ).run(
135
        newId(),
136
        candidate_id,
137
        JSON.stringify(beforeAudit),
138
        JSON.stringify(afterAudit),
139
        JSON.stringify(shifts),
140
        decidedAt,
141
      );
142
      return 'approved' as const;
143
    }
144
145
    if (action === 'retry') return 'retry-queued' as const;
146
    if (action === 'reject') return 'rejected' as const;
147
    return 'approved' as const;
148
  });
149
150
  revalidatePath(`/cards/${candidate.card_id}`);
151
  revalidatePath('/');
152
  return { next_action: nextAction };
153
}

export async function retryChannel(
156
  card_id: string,
157
  channel: Channel,
158
  feedback?: string,
159
): Promise<{ candidates: HarnessCandidate[] }> {
160
  const batch = await generateForChannel(card_id, channel, undefined, feedback);
161
  revalidatePath(`/cards/${card_id}`);
162
  revalidatePath('/');
163
  return { candidates: batch.candidates };
164
}

166
/**
167
 * Wipes the generator phase for a card: candidates and everything downstream
168
 * (audits, decisions, edits, final picks). Preserves the release card, facts,
169
 * grounder runs, and historical metrics. Lets the operator re-run the
170
 * generator from scratch after a retry-cap or after iterating on the pipeline.
171
 */
172
export async function resetGenerator(
173
  card_id: string,
174
): Promise<{
175
  deleted: {
176
    candidates: number;
177
    candidate_audits: number;
178
    candidate_decisions: number;
179
    candidate_text_edits: number;
180
    candidate_semantic_edits: number;
181
    final_picks: number;
182
    generator_attempts: number;
183
    actor_attempts: number;
184
    director_audits: number;
185
  };
186
}> {
187
  const db = getDb();
188
  const counts = writeTx(db, () => {
189
    const candidateIdsRow = db
190
      .prepare('SELECT id FROM candidates WHERE card_id = ?')
191
      .all(card_id) as Array<{ id: string }>;
192
    const candidateIds = candidateIdsRow.map((r) => r.id);
193
194
    let candidate_audits = 0;
195
    let candidate_decisions = 0;
196
    let candidate_text_edits = 0;
197
    let candidate_semantic_edits = 0;
198
    let director_audits = 0;
199
    if (candidateIds.length > 0) {
200
      const placeholders = candidateIds.map(() => '?').join(',');
201
      director_audits = db
202
        .prepare(`DELETE FROM director_audits WHERE candidate_id IN (${placeholders})`)
203
        .run(...candidateIds).changes;
204
      candidate_audits = db
205
        .prepare(`DELETE FROM candidate_audits WHERE candidate_id IN (${placeholders})`)
206
        .run(...candidateIds).changes;
207
      candidate_decisions = db
208
        .prepare(`DELETE FROM candidate_decisions WHERE candidate_id IN (${placeholders})`)
209
        .run(...candidateIds).changes;
210
      candidate_text_edits = db
211
        .prepare(`DELETE FROM candidate_text_edits WHERE candidate_id IN (${placeholders})`)
212
        .run(...candidateIds).changes;
213
      candidate_semantic_edits = db
214
        .prepare(`DELETE FROM candidate_semantic_edits WHERE candidate_id IN (${placeholders})`)
215
        .run(...candidateIds).changes;
216
    }
217
218
    const final_picks = db
219
      .prepare('DELETE FROM final_picks WHERE card_id = ?')
220
      .run(card_id).changes;
221
    const candidates = db
222
      .prepare('DELETE FROM candidates WHERE card_id = ?')
223
      .run(card_id).changes;
224
    const generator_attempts = db
225
      .prepare('DELETE FROM generator_attempts WHERE card_id = ?')
226
      .run(card_id).changes;
227
    db.prepare('DELETE FROM actor_warmups WHERE card_id = ?')
228
      .run(card_id);
229
    const actor_attempts = db
230
      .prepare('DELETE FROM actor_attempts WHERE card_id = ?')
231
      .run(card_id).changes;
232
233
    return {
234
      candidates,
235
      candidate_audits,
236
      candidate_decisions,
237
      candidate_text_edits,
238
      candidate_semantic_edits,
239
      final_picks,
240
      generator_attempts,
241
      actor_attempts,
242
      director_audits,
243
    };
244
  });
245
246
  revalidatePath(`/cards/${card_id}`);
247
  revalidatePath('/');
248
  return { deleted: counts };
249
}
250
251
/**
252
 * Wipes one attempt for one channel of a card: the generator_attempts row plus
253
 * that attempt's candidates and their downstream rows (audits, decisions,
254
 * edits, final_picks). Leaves other attempts and other channels untouched.
255
 * Useful when you want to retry one bad attempt without nuking the history.
256
 */
257
export async function resetAttempt(
258
  card_id: string,
259
  channel: Channel,
260
  attempt: number,
261
): Promise<{
262
  deleted: {
263
    candidates: number;
264
    candidate_audits: number;
265
    candidate_decisions: number;
266
    candidate_text_edits: number;
267
    candidate_semantic_edits: number;
268
    final_picks: number;
269
    generator_attempts: number;
270
    actor_attempts: number;
271
    director_audits: number;
272
  };
273
}> {
274
  const db = getDb();
275
  const counts = writeTx(db, () => {
276
    const candidateIdsRow = db
277
      .prepare('SELECT id FROM candidates WHERE card_id = ? AND channel = ? AND attempt = ?')
278
      .all(card_id, channel, attempt) as Array<{ id: string }>;
279
    const candidateIds = candidateIdsRow.map((r) => r.id);
280
281
    let candidate_audits = 0;
282
    let candidate_decisions = 0;
283
    let candidate_text_edits = 0;
284
    let candidate_semantic_edits = 0;
285
    let final_picks = 0;
286
    let director_audits = 0;
287
    if (candidateIds.length > 0) {
288
      const placeholders = candidateIds.map(() => '?').join(',');
289
      director_audits = db
290
        .prepare(`DELETE FROM director_audits WHERE candidate_id IN (${placeholders})`)
291
        .run(...candidateIds).changes;
292
      candidate_audits = db
293
        .prepare(`DELETE FROM candidate_audits WHERE candidate_id IN (${placeholders})`)
294
        .run(...candidateIds).changes;
295
      candidate_decisions = db
296
        .prepare(`DELETE FROM candidate_decisions WHERE candidate_id IN (${placeholders})`)
297
        .run(...candidateIds).changes;
298
      candidate_text_edits = db
299
        .prepare(`DELETE FROM candidate_text_edits WHERE candidate_id IN (${placeholders})`)
300
        .run(...candidateIds).changes;
301
      candidate_semantic_edits = db
302
        .prepare(`DELETE FROM candidate_semantic_edits WHERE candidate_id IN (${placeholders})`)
303
        .run(...candidateIds).changes;
304
      final_picks = db
305
        .prepare(`DELETE FROM final_picks WHERE candidate_id IN (${placeholders})`)
306
        .run(...candidateIds).changes;
307
    }
308
309
    const candidates = db
310
      .prepare('DELETE FROM candidates WHERE card_id = ? AND channel = ? AND attempt = ?')
311
      .run(card_id, channel, attempt).changes;
312
    const generator_attempts = db
313
      .prepare('DELETE FROM generator_attempts WHERE card_id = ? AND channel = ? AND attempt = ?')
314
      .run(card_id, channel, attempt).changes;
315
    const actor_attempts = 0;
316
317
    return {
318
      candidates,
319
      candidate_audits,
320
      candidate_decisions,
321
      candidate_text_edits,
322
      candidate_semantic_edits,
323
      final_picks,
324
      generator_attempts,
325
      actor_attempts,
326
      director_audits,
327
    };
328
  });
329
330
  revalidatePath(`/cards/${card_id}`);
331
  revalidatePath('/');
332
  return { deleted: counts };
333
}
334
335
async function generateForChannel(
336
  cardId: string,
337
  channel: Channel,
338
  n?: number,
339
  operatorFeedback?: string,
340
): Promise<{ channel: Channel; candidates: HarnessCandidate[] }> {
341
  if (!process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY && process.env.HARNESS_ALLOW_STUB_GENERATOR !== '1') {
342
    throw new Error(
343
      'ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is required to run the generator in the harness. Set HARNESS_ALLOW_STUB_GENERATOR=1 to explicitly allow stub generation.',
344
    );
345
  }
346
347
  const db = getDb();
348
  const card = requireCard(cardId, db);
349
  const releaseCardJson = getReleaseCardJson(cardId, db);
350
  if (!releaseCardJson) throw new Error('No release card exists for this card.');
351
  const releaseCard = parseReleaseCard(JSON.parse(releaseCardJson));
352
  const attemptBase = nextAttempt(db, cardId, channel);
353
  if (attemptBase > 3) throw new Error(`Retry cap reached for ${channel}; manual intervention required.`);
354
355
  const voice = voiceSpecFor(card.voice);
356
  const defaultBeats = defaultBeatsForVoice(card.voice);
357
  const mode = process.env.HARNESS_ALLOW_STUB_GENERATOR === '1' ? 'stub' : 'live';
358
  // The LLM validator (active validator) is the gating voice; regex is the
359
  // pre-filter only. Default ON unless explicitly disabled. If disabled while
360
  // there's no API key, fail loudly — silent fallback to regex-only would
361
  // mean validation is just pattern matching, which catches AI-slop but
362
  // cannot reason about claim validity or paraphrased facts.
363
  const activeDisabled = process.env.HARNESS_ACTIVE_VALIDATOR === '0';
364
  const useActiveValidator = !activeDisabled;
365
  if (useActiveValidator && !process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) {
366
    throw new Error(
367
      'The LLM validator (active validator) is the gating voice and requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY. ' +
368
        'Either set the key or explicitly disable the active validator with HARNESS_ACTIVE_VALIDATOR=0 ' +
369
        '(NOT recommended — regex-only mode catches AI-slop but cannot reason about claim validity).',
370
    );
371
  }
372
  const auditByGeneratedCandidateId = new Map<string, CandidateAuditPersistence>();
373
  const attemptCaptures = new Map<number, AttemptPersistence>();
374
375
  // The orchestrator drives generateAttempt with a fresh {attempt, feedback}
376
  // per retry. We capture both inputs (feedback IN) and the prompt object the
377
  // generator wrote into (capture OUT). Persistence happens after the loop.
378
  const generateAttempt = ({
379
    attempt,
380
    feedback,
381
  }: {
382
    attempt: number;
383
    feedback?: string;
384
  }) => {
385
    const capture: GenerationPromptCapture = {};
386
    attemptCaptures.set(attempt, {
387
      orchestratorAttempt: attempt,
388
      feedbackIn: operatorFeedback ?? feedback,
389
      capture,
390
    });
391
    return generate(releaseCard, {
392
      channel,
393
      n,
394
      voice,
395
      defaultBeats,
396
      feedback: operatorFeedback ?? feedback,
397
      mode,
398
      capturePrompts: capture,
399
    });
400
  };
401
402
  const attempts = useActiveValidator
403
    ? await runActiveOrchestrationForHarness(
404
        releaseCard,
405
        channel,
406
        cardId,
407
        db,
408
        generateAttempt,
409
        voice,
410
        auditByGeneratedCandidateId,
411
      )
412
    : (await orchestrateWithRetries(
413
        releaseCard,
414
        [channel],
415
        generateAttempt,
416
        { maxAttempts: 3 },
417
      )).attempts;
418
419
  const inserted = writeTx(db, () => {
420
    const insertedCandidates: HarnessCandidate[] = [];
421
    for (const attempt of attempts) {
422
      const dbAttemptNum = attemptBase + (attempt.attempt - 1);
423
      const channelCandidates = attempt.candidates.filter((c) => c.channel === channel);
424
      const persistence = attemptCaptures.get(attempt.attempt);
425
      const generatorSource: 'anthropic' | 'stub' =
426
        channelCandidates[0]?.source ?? (mode === 'stub' ? 'stub' : 'anthropic');
427
      const createdAtForAttempt = nowIso();
428
429
      db.prepare(
430
        `INSERT INTO generator_attempts
431
           (id, card_id, channel, attempt, auto_feedback_in,
432
            inner_work_prompt_json, drafting_prompt_json, legacy_prompt_json,
433
            generator_source, created_at)
434
         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
435
      ).run(
436
        newId(),
437
        cardId,
438
        channel,
439
        dbAttemptNum,
440
        persistence?.feedbackIn ?? null,
441
        persistence?.capture.inner_work ? JSON.stringify(persistence.capture.inner_work) : null,
442
        persistence?.capture.drafting ? JSON.stringify(persistence.capture.drafting) : null,
443
        persistence?.capture.legacy ? JSON.stringify(persistence.capture.legacy) : null,
444
        generatorSource,
445
        createdAtForAttempt,
446
      );
447
448
      for (const candidate of channelCandidates) {
449
        const beats: BeatSequence = { beats: candidate.declared_beats };
450
        const validation = validate(candidate.text, {
451
          beats,
452
          voice,
453
          card: releaseCard,
454
          deployed_facts_used: candidate.deployed_facts_used,
455
          not_said: candidate.not_said,
456
        });
457
        const id = newId();
458
        const createdAt = nowIso();
459
        db.prepare(
460
          `INSERT INTO candidates
461
             (id, card_id, channel, attempt, text, declared_beats_json, beat_audit_json,
462
              validation_passed, validation_failures_json, rationale, source, created_at)
463
           VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
464
        ).run(
465
          id,
466
          cardId,
467
          channel,
468
          dbAttemptNum,
469
          candidate.text,
470
          JSON.stringify(candidate.declared_beats),
471
          JSON.stringify(validation.beat_audit ?? []),
472
          validation.passed ? 1 : 0,
473
          JSON.stringify(validation.failures),
474
          candidate.rationale ?? null,
475
          candidate.source,
476
          createdAt,
477
        );
478
        const activeAudit = auditByGeneratedCandidateId.get(candidate.id);
479
        if (activeAudit) {
480
          db.prepare(
481
            `INSERT INTO candidate_audits
482
               (id, candidate_id, active_validation_passed, active_audit_json,
483
                history_guard_passed, history_guard_json, created_at)
484
             VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
485
          ).run(
486
            newId(),
487
            id,
488
            activeAudit.active_validation_passed ? 1 : 0,
489
            activeAudit.active_audit_json,
490
            activeAudit.history_guard_passed === null ? null : activeAudit.history_guard_passed ? 1 : 0,
491
            activeAudit.history_guard_json,
492
            createdAt,
493
          );
494
        }
495
        insertedCandidates.push({
496
          id,
497
          card_id: cardId,
498
          channel,
499
          attempt: dbAttemptNum,
500
          text: candidate.text,
501
          declared_beats_json: JSON.stringify(candidate.declared_beats),
502
          beat_audit_json: JSON.stringify(validation.beat_audit ?? []),
503
          validation_passed: validation.passed,
504
          validation_failures_json: JSON.stringify(validation.failures),
505
          active_validation_passed: activeAudit?.active_validation_passed ?? null,
506
          active_audit_json: activeAudit?.active_audit_json ?? null,
507
          history_guard_passed: activeAudit?.history_guard_passed ?? null,
508
          history_guard_json: activeAudit?.history_guard_json ?? null,
509
          director_audit_id: null,
510
          director_passed: null,
511
          director_audit_json: null,
512
          rationale: candidate.rationale ?? null,
513
          source: candidate.source,
514
          prompt_variant: null,
515
          created_at: createdAt,
516
        });
517
      }
518
    }
519
    return insertedCandidates;
520
  });
521
522
  return { channel, candidates: inserted };
523
}
524
525
async function runActorGenerator(
526
  cardId: string,
527
  channels: Channel[],
528
  n?: number,
529
): Promise<{ candidates_by_channel: Record<Channel, HarnessCandidate[]> }> {
530
  if (!process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) {
531
    throw new Error(
532
      'ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is required to run the actor/director generator in the harness. Actor/director stub generation has been removed; use the legacy generator if you need explicit stub output.',
533
    );
534
  }
535
536
  const db = getDb();
537
  const card = requireCard(cardId, db);
538
  const releaseCardJson = getReleaseCardJson(cardId, db);
539
  if (!releaseCardJson) throw new Error('No release card exists for this card.');
540
  const releaseCard = parseReleaseCard(JSON.parse(releaseCardJson));
541
  const voice = voiceSpecFor(card.voice);
542
  const mode = 'live';
543
  const warmupMode = parseActorWarmupMode(process.env.HARNESS_ACTOR_WARMUP);
544
  const optionCount = n ?? 5;
545
  const attemptBase = nextActorAttempt(db, cardId);
546
547
  const result = await orchestrateActorDirectorWithRetries(releaseCard, channels, {
548
    n: optionCount,
549
    warmup_mode: warmupMode,
550
    voice,
551
    mode,
552
    maxAttempts: 3,
553
  });
554
555
  const inserted = persistActorDirectorResult(db, {
556
    cardId,
557
    releaseCard,
558
    result,
559
    attemptBase,
560
  });
561
562
  const grouped: Record<Channel, HarnessCandidate[]> = {
563
    x: [],
564
    web: [],
565
    'in-product': [],
566
  };
567
  for (const candidate of inserted) grouped[candidate.channel].push(candidate);
568
569
  revalidatePath(`/cards/${cardId}`);
570
  revalidatePath('/');
571
  return { candidates_by_channel: grouped };
572
}
573
574
function persistActorDirectorResult(
575
  db: ReturnType<typeof getDb>,
576
  opts: {
577
    cardId: string;
578
    releaseCard: ReturnType<typeof parseReleaseCard>;
579
    result: ActorDirectorResult;
580
    attemptBase: number;
581
  },
582
): HarnessCandidate[] {
583
  return writeTx(db, () => {
584
    const insertedCandidates: HarnessCandidate[] = [];
585
    for (const attempt of opts.result.attempts) {
586
      const dbAttemptNum = opts.attemptBase + (attempt.attempt - 1);
587
      const actorAttemptId = newId();
588
      const createdAtForAttempt = nowIso();
589
      db.prepare(
590
        `INSERT INTO actor_attempts
591
           (id, card_id, attempt, channels_json, source_index_json, prompt_version,
592
            prompt_hash, model, director_notes_in_json, actor_prompt_json,
593
            actor_transcript_json, actor_response_json, table_work_json,
594
            generator_source, created_at)
595
         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
596
      ).run(
597
        actorAttemptId,
598
        opts.cardId,
599
        dbAttemptNum,
600
        JSON.stringify([...new Set(attempt.records.map((r) => r.candidate.channel))]),
601
        JSON.stringify(attempt.actor.memory.source_index),
602
        attempt.actor.memory.version,
603
        attempt.actor.memory.prompt_hash,
604
        process.env.COMMS_ACTOR_MODEL ?? null,
605
        attempt.director_notes_in ? JSON.stringify(attempt.director_notes_in) : null,
606
        JSON.stringify(attempt.actor.prompt),
607
        JSON.stringify(attempt.actor.transcript_messages),
608
        attempt.actor.raw_response,
609
        JSON.stringify(attempt.actor.output.table_work),
610
        attempt.actor.source,
611
        createdAtForAttempt,
612
      );
613
      db.prepare(
614
        `INSERT INTO actor_warmups
615
           (id, actor_attempt_id, card_id, attempt, daily_pages_json, created_at)
616
         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
617
      ).run(
618
        newId(),
619
        actorAttemptId,
620
        opts.cardId,
621
        dbAttemptNum,
622
        JSON.stringify(attempt.actor.output.warmup),
623
        createdAtForAttempt,
624
      );
625
626
      for (const record of attempt.records) {
627
        const candidate = record.candidate;
628
        const id = newId();
629
        const createdAt = nowIso();
630
        let directorAuditId: string | null = null;
631
        const directorPassed = record.director_audit
632
          ? record.director_audit.passed && record.director_audit.infinex_fit.legal
633
          : null;
634
        db.prepare(
635
          `INSERT INTO candidates
636
             (id, card_id, channel, attempt, text, declared_beats_json, beat_audit_json,
637
              validation_passed, validation_failures_json, rationale, source, created_at)
638
           VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
639
        ).run(
640
          id,
641
          opts.cardId,
642
          candidate.channel,
643
          dbAttemptNum,
644
          candidate.text,
645
          JSON.stringify(candidate.declared_beats),
646
          JSON.stringify(record.script_validation.beat_audit ?? []),
647
          record.script_validation.passed ? 1 : 0,
648
          JSON.stringify(record.script_validation.failures),
649
          candidate.rationale ?? null,
650
          candidate.source,
651
          createdAt,
652
        );
653
654
        if (record.director_audit) {
655
          directorAuditId = newId();
656
          db.prepare(
657
            `INSERT INTO director_audits
658
               (id, actor_attempt_id, candidate_id, card_id, channel, attempt,
659
                director_model, director_prompt_json, director_audit_json, passed, created_at)
660
             VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
661
          ).run(
662
            directorAuditId,
663
            actorAttemptId,
664
            id,
665
            opts.cardId,
666
            candidate.channel,
667
            dbAttemptNum,
668
            process.env.COMMS_DIRECTOR_MODEL ?? process.env.COMMS_ACTIVE_VALIDATOR_MODEL ?? null,
669
            JSON.stringify(record.director_audit.prompt),
670
            JSON.stringify(record.director_audit),
671
            directorPassed ? 1 : 0,
672
            createdAt,
673
          );
674
        }
675
676
        insertedCandidates.push({
677
          id,
678
          card_id: opts.cardId,
679
          channel: candidate.channel,
680
          attempt: dbAttemptNum,
681
          text: candidate.text,
682
          declared_beats_json: JSON.stringify(candidate.declared_beats),
683
          beat_audit_json: JSON.stringify(record.script_validation.beat_audit ?? []),
684
          validation_passed: record.script_validation.passed,
685
          validation_failures_json: JSON.stringify(record.script_validation.failures),
686
          active_validation_passed: null,
687
          active_audit_json: null,
688
          history_guard_passed: null,
689
          history_guard_json: null,
690
          director_audit_id: directorAuditId,
691
          director_passed: directorPassed,
692
          director_audit_json: record.director_audit ? JSON.stringify(record.director_audit) : null,
693
          rationale: candidate.rationale ?? null,
694
          source: candidate.source,
695
          prompt_variant: null,
696
          created_at: createdAt,
697
        });
698
      }
699
    }
700
    return insertedCandidates;
701
  });
702
}
703
704
async function runActiveOrchestrationForHarness(
705
  releaseCard: ReturnType<typeof parseReleaseCard>,
706
  channel: Channel,
707
  cardId: string,
708
  db: ReturnType<typeof getDb>,
709
  generateAttempt: (ctx: { attempt: number; feedback?: string }) => Promise<Candidate[]>,
710
  voice: ReturnType<typeof voiceSpecFor>,
711
  auditByGeneratedCandidateId: Map<string, CandidateAuditPersistence>,
712
) {
713
  const result = await orchestrateActiveWithRetries(
714
    releaseCard,
715
    [channel],
716
    generateAttempt,
717
    {
718
      voice,
719
      recentCopyByChannel: {
720
        [channel]: recentCopyForChannel(db, channel, cardId),
721
      },
722
      maxAttempts: 3,
723
    },
724
  );
725
  captureActiveAudits(result, auditByGeneratedCandidateId);
726
  return result.attempts;
727
}
728
729
function captureActiveAudits(
730
  result: ActiveRetryOrchestrationResult,
731
  auditByGeneratedCandidateId: Map<string, CandidateAuditPersistence>,
732
): void {
733
  for (const attempt of result.attempts) {
734
    for (const pick of attempt.result.picks) {
735
      auditByGeneratedCandidateId.set(
736
        pick.candidate.id,
737
        serializeCandidateAudit(pick.verdict, pick.history),
738
      );
739
    }
740
    for (const rejected of attempt.result.rejected) {
741
      auditByGeneratedCandidateId.set(
742
        rejected.candidate.id,
743
        serializeCandidateAudit(rejected.verdict, rejected.history ?? null),
744
      );
745
    }
746
  }
747
}
748
749
function serializeCandidateAudit(
750
  verdict: ActiveValidationVerdict,
751
  history: HistoryGuardResult | null,
752
): CandidateAuditPersistence {
753
  return {
754
    active_validation_passed: verdict.passed,
755
    active_audit_json: JSON.stringify(verdict),
756
    history_guard_passed: history ? history.passed : null,
757
    history_guard_json: history ? JSON.stringify(history) : null,
758
  };
759
}
760
761
function recentCopyForChannel(
762
  db: ReturnType<typeof getDb>,
763
  channel: Channel,
764
  excludeCardId: string,
765
): ShippedCopyRecord[] {
766
  const rows = db.prepare(
767
    `SELECT fp.id, fp.channel, fp.final_text AS text, fp.shipped_at,
768
            c.declared_beats_json
769
       FROM final_picks fp
770
       JOIN candidates c ON c.id = fp.candidate_id
771
      WHERE fp.channel = ?
772
        AND fp.card_id != ?
773
      ORDER BY COALESCE(fp.shipped_at, '') DESC, fp.id DESC
774
      LIMIT 24`,
775
  ).all(channel, excludeCardId) as Array<{
776
    id: string;
777
    channel: Channel;
778
    text: string;
779
    shipped_at: string | null;
780
    declared_beats_json: string;
781
  }>;
782
783
  return rows.map((row) => ({
784
    id: row.id,
785
    channel: row.channel,
786
    text: row.text,
787
    shipped_at: row.shipped_at,
788
    primary_tempo: parseJson<Array<{ tempo?: string }>>(row.declared_beats_json, [])[0]?.tempo ?? null,
789
  }));
790
}
791
792
function nextAttempt(db: ReturnType<typeof getDb>, cardId: string, channel: Channel): number {
793
  const row = db
794
    .prepare('SELECT COALESCE(MAX(attempt), 0) + 1 AS attempt FROM candidates WHERE card_id = ? AND channel = ?')
795
    .get(cardId, channel) as { attempt: number };
796
  return row.attempt;
797
}
798
799
function nextActorAttempt(db: ReturnType<typeof getDb>, cardId: string): number {
800
  const row = db
801
    .prepare('SELECT COALESCE(MAX(attempt), 0) + 1 AS attempt FROM candidates WHERE card_id = ?')
802
    .get(cardId) as { attempt: number };
803
  return row.attempt;
804
}
805
806
function parseBeatSequence(json: string): BeatSequence {
807
  return { beats: parseJson(json, []) };
808
}
809
810
function parseJson<T>(json: string, fallback: T): T {
811
  try {
812
    return JSON.parse(json) as T;
813
  } catch {
814
    return fallback;
815
  }
816
}
817

harness/lib/classifier-wrapper.ts

36 lines
1
import { auditBeats, classifyTempoBlind } from '@pipeline/validator';
2
import type { BeatAuditResult, BeatSequence } from '@pipeline/voice/types';
3
import type { VoiceName } from './types';
4
import { voiceSpecFor } from './voice';
5
6
export interface ClassifyTextOptions {
7
  voice?: VoiceName;
8
  beats?: BeatSequence;
9
}
10
11
export async function classifyText(
12
  text: string,
13
  opts: ClassifyTextOptions = {},
14
): Promise<BeatAuditResult[]> {
15
  const voice = voiceSpecFor(opts.voice ?? 'infinex');
16
  if (opts.beats) return auditBeats(text, opts.beats, voice);
17
18
  return text
19
    .split(/\n\s*\n+/)
20
    .map((paragraph) => paragraph.trim())
21
    .filter(Boolean)
22
    .map((paragraph, beatIndex) => {
23
      const classification = classifyTempoBlind(paragraph, voice);
24
      return {
25
        beat_index: beatIndex,
26
        declared_tempo: classification.tempo === 'unknown' ? voice.main_tempi[0]! : classification.tempo,
27
        classified_tempo: classification.tempo,
28
        classified_confidence: classification.confidence,
29
        passed: classification.tempo !== 'unknown',
30
        ...(classification.tempo === 'unknown'
31
          ? { reason: 'deterministic classifier could not identify a tempo' }
32
          : {}),
33
      };
34
    });
35
}
36

Actor / Director Pipeline

The new generation loop: Actor produces candidates, Director classifies and returns notes, deterministic validator still records hygiene results.

src/actor-orchestrator.ts

317 lines
1
import type { ReleaseCard } from "./card.js";
2
import type { Candidate, Channel } from "./generator.js";
3
import { validate, type RuleFailure, type ValidationResult } from "./validator.js";
4
import { INFINEX_VOICE } from "./voice/infinex.js";
5
import { PREPARATION_PAIRS } from "./voice/types.js";
6
import { checkPrepHierarchy } from "./voice/laban.js";
7
import type { CharacterSpec, QuickAction, WorkingAction } from "./voice/types.js";
8
import {
9
  auditCandidateWithDirector,
10
  generateActorAttempt,
11
  type ActorAttemptResult,
12
  type ActorTranscriptMessage,
13
  type ActorWarmupMode,
14
  type AuditCandidateWithDirectorOptions,
15
  type DirectorAuditResult,
16
  type DirectorNotes,
17
  type GenerateActorAttemptOptions,
18
} from "./actor-director.js";
19
20
export interface ActorDirectorCandidateRecord {
21
  candidate: Candidate;
22
  script_validation: ValidationResult;
23
  director_audit?: DirectorAuditResult;
24
}
25
26
export interface ActorDirectorAttempt {
27
  attempt: number;
28
  director_notes_in?: DirectorNotes;
29
  actor: ActorAttemptResult;
30
  records: ActorDirectorCandidateRecord[];
31
  picks: Candidate[];
32
  director_notes: DirectorNotes;
33
}
34
35
export interface ActorDirectorResult {
36
  attempts: ActorDirectorAttempt[];
37
  picks: Candidate[];
38
  exhausted: boolean;
39
}
40
41
export type ActorAttemptFn = (
42
  card: ReleaseCard,
43
  opts: GenerateActorAttemptOptions,
44
) => Promise<ActorAttemptResult>;
45
46
export type DirectorAuditFn = (
47
  opts: AuditCandidateWithDirectorOptions,
48
) => Promise<DirectorAuditResult>;
49
50
export interface ActorDirectorRetryOptions {
51
  voice?: CharacterSpec;
52
  n?: number;
53
  warmup_mode?: ActorWarmupMode;
54
  maxAttempts?: number;
55
  actor?: ActorAttemptFn;
56
  director?: DirectorAuditFn;
57
  actor_model?: string;
58
  director_model?: string;
59
  mode?: "live" | "stub" | "auto";
60
  actor_client?: GenerateActorAttemptOptions["client"];
61
  director_client?: AuditCandidateWithDirectorOptions["client"];
62
}
63
64
const CHANNEL_MAX_LEN: Record<Channel, number> = {
65
  x: 280,
66
  web: 140,
67
  "in-product": 80,
68
};
69
70
export async function orchestrateActorDirectorWithRetries(
71
  card: ReleaseCard,
72
  channels: Channel[],
73
  opts: ActorDirectorRetryOptions = {},
74
): Promise<ActorDirectorResult> {
75
  const voice = opts.voice ?? INFINEX_VOICE;
76
  const maxAttempts = opts.maxAttempts ?? 3;
77
  const actor = opts.actor ?? generateActorAttempt;
78
  const director = opts.director ?? auditCandidateWithDirector;
79
  const attempts: ActorDirectorAttempt[] = [];
80
  let transcript: ActorTranscriptMessage[] | undefined;
81
  let notes: DirectorNotes | undefined;
82
  let finalPicks: Candidate[] = [];
83
84
  for (let attemptNo = 1; attemptNo <= maxAttempts; attemptNo++) {
85
    const notesIn = notes;
86
    const actorResult = await actor(card, {
87
      channels,
88
      ...(opts.n !== undefined ? { n: opts.n } : {}),
89
      ...(opts.warmup_mode !== undefined ? { warmup_mode: opts.warmup_mode } : {}),
90
      voice,
91
      ...(opts.mode !== undefined ? { mode: opts.mode } : {}),
92
      ...(opts.actor_model !== undefined ? { model: opts.actor_model } : {}),
93
      ...(opts.actor_client !== undefined ? { client: opts.actor_client } : {}),
94
      ...(transcript !== undefined ? { previous_transcript: transcript } : {}),
95
      ...(notesIn !== undefined ? { director_notes: notesIn } : {}),
96
    });
97
    transcript = actorResult.transcript_messages;
98
99
    const records: ActorDirectorCandidateRecord[] = [];
100
    for (const candidate of actorResult.candidates) {
101
      const script = validateCandidate(candidate, card, voice);
102
      const record: ActorDirectorCandidateRecord = {
103
        candidate,
104
        script_validation: script,
105
      };
106
      if (script.passed) {
107
        const audit = await director({
108
          card,
109
          candidate,
110
          channel: candidate.channel,
111
          voice,
112
          ...(opts.mode !== undefined ? { mode: opts.mode } : {}),
113
          ...(opts.director_model !== undefined ? { model: opts.director_model } : {}),
114
          ...(opts.director_client !== undefined ? { client: opts.director_client } : {}),
115
        });
116
        record.director_audit = audit;
117
      }
118
      records.push(record);
119
    }
120
121
    const picks = pickFirstPassingByChannel(records, channels);
122
    notes = summarizeDirectorNotes(attemptNo, channels, records, picks);
123
    attempts.push({
124
      attempt: attemptNo,
125
      ...(notesIn !== undefined ? { director_notes_in: notesIn } : {}),
126
      actor: actorResult,
127
      records,
128
      picks,
129
      director_notes: notes,
130
    });
131
    finalPicks = picks;
132
    if (picks.length >= channels.length) {
133
      return { attempts, picks, exhausted: false };
134
    }
135
  }
136
137
  return { attempts, picks: finalPicks, exhausted: true };
138
}
139
140
function validateCandidate(candidate: Candidate, card: ReleaseCard, voice: CharacterSpec): ValidationResult {
141
  const result = validate(candidate.text, {
142
    card,
143
    voice,
144
    ...(candidate.deployed_facts_used !== undefined ? { deployed_facts_used: candidate.deployed_facts_used } : {}),
145
    ...(candidate.not_said !== undefined ? { not_said: candidate.not_said } : {}),
146
  });
147
  const max = CHANNEL_MAX_LEN[candidate.channel];
148
  if (candidate.text.length > max) {
149
    result.failures.push({
150
      rule: "length",
151
      reason: `length: ${candidate.text.length} > ${max} for channel ${candidate.channel}`,
152
    });
153
    result.passed = false;
154
  }
155
  const movementFailures = validateActorMovement(candidate);
156
  if (movementFailures.length > 0) {
157
    result.failures.push(...movementFailures);
158
    result.passed = false;
159
  }
160
  return result;
161
}
162
163
export function validateActorMovement(candidate: Candidate): RuleFailure[] {
164
  const failures: RuleFailure[] = [];
165
166
  if (candidate.declared_beats.some((beat) => beat.tempo !== undefined)) {
167
    failures.push({
168
      rule: "actor-tempo-leak",
169
      reason: "Actor candidate declared a tempo; actor must score objective verbs and Working Actions only.",
170
    });
171
  }
172
173
  const score = candidate.movement_score ?? candidate.declared_beats.flatMap((beat) => {
174
    if (!beat.working_action || !beat.objective_verb || !beat.physical_score) return [];
175
    return [{
176
      objective_verb: beat.objective_verb,
177
      working_action: beat.working_action,
178
      physical_score: beat.physical_score,
179
      ...(beat.preparation_from ? { preparation_from: beat.preparation_from } : {}),
180
    }];
181
  });
182
183
  if (score.length === 0) {
184
    failures.push({
185
      rule: "movement-score",
186
      reason: "Actor candidate is missing movement_score; rhythm must be scored as Working Actions before prose is judged.",
187
    });
188
  }
189
190
  for (const [i, beat] of score.entries()) {
191
    if (!isWorkingAction(beat.working_action)) {
192
      failures.push({
193
        rule: "movement-score",
194
        reason: `movement_score.${i}.working_action is not a Mirodan Working Action: ${String(beat.working_action)}`,
195
      });
196
    }
197
    if (beat.preparation_from !== undefined && !isWorkingAction(beat.preparation_from)) {
198
      failures.push({
199
        rule: "movement-score",
200
        reason: `movement_score.${i}.preparation_from is not a Mirodan Working Action: ${String(beat.preparation_from)}`,
201
      });
202
    }
203
  }
204
205
  const validMotors = score
206
    .map((beat) => beat.working_action)
207
    .filter(isWorkingAction);
208
  for (const failingIndex of checkPrepHierarchy(validMotors)) {
209
    const quick = validMotors[failingIndex];
210
    if (!quick) continue;
211
    failures.push({
212
      rule: "movement-prep",
213
      reason: `${quick} requires prior ${PREPARATION_PAIRS[quick as QuickAction]} in the same movement score.`,
214
    });
215
  }
216
217
  const receipts = candidate.movement_receipt ?? [];
218
  if (receipts.length === 0) {
219
    failures.push({
220
      rule: "movement-receipt",
221
      reason: "Actor candidate is missing movement_receipt; selected prose must map text spans to Working Actions.",
222
    });
223
  }
224
225
  const scoreActions = new Set(validMotors);
226
  for (const [i, receipt] of receipts.entries()) {
227
    if (!isWorkingAction(receipt.working_action)) {
228
      failures.push({
229
        rule: "movement-receipt",
230
        reason: `movement_receipt.${i}.working_action is not a Mirodan Working Action: ${String(receipt.working_action)}`,
231
      });
232
      continue;
233
    }
234
    if (!scoreActions.has(receipt.working_action)) {
235
      failures.push({
236
        rule: "movement-receipt",
237
        reason: `movement_receipt.${i} uses ${receipt.working_action}, which is absent from the channel movement score.`,
238
      });
239
    }
240
    if (!receipt.text_span || !candidate.text.includes(receipt.text_span)) {
241
      failures.push({
242
        rule: "movement-receipt",
243
        reason: `movement_receipt.${i}.text_span does not appear exactly in selected candidate text.`,
244
      });
245
    }
246
  }
247
248
  return failures;
249
}
250
251
function isWorkingAction(value: unknown): value is WorkingAction {
252
  return (
253
    value === "pressing" ||
254
    value === "wringing" ||
255
    value === "gliding" ||
256
    value === "floating" ||
257
    value === "punching" ||
258
    value === "slashing" ||
259
    value === "dabbing" ||
260
    value === "flicking"
261
  );
262
}
263
264
function pickFirstPassingByChannel(records: ActorDirectorCandidateRecord[], channels: Channel[]): Candidate[] {
265
  const picks: Candidate[] = [];
266
  for (const channel of channels) {
267
    const record = records.find((candidateRecord) =>
268
      candidateRecord.candidate.channel === channel &&
269
      candidateRecord.script_validation.passed &&
270
      candidateRecord.director_audit?.passed === true &&
271
      candidateRecord.director_audit.infinex_fit.legal === true,
272
    );
273
    if (record) picks.push(record.candidate);
274
  }
275
  return picks;
276
}
277
278
function summarizeDirectorNotes(
279
  attempt: number,
280
  channels: Channel[],
281
  records: ActorDirectorCandidateRecord[],
282
  picks: Candidate[],
283
): DirectorNotes {
284
  const pickedChannels = new Set(picks.map((candidate) => candidate.channel));
285
  const missing = channels.filter((channel) => !pickedChannels.has(channel));
286
  const notes: string[] = [];
287
288
  if (missing.length > 0) {
289
    notes.push(`Missing valid performances for channels: ${missing.join(", ")}.`);
290
  }
291
292
  for (const record of records) {
293
    if (!record.script_validation.passed) {
294
      const failure = record.script_validation.failures[0];
295
      notes.push(`${record.candidate.channel}: script supervisor rejected "${preview(record.candidate.text)}" because ${failure?.rule ?? "validation"} — ${failure?.reason ?? "failed"}.`);
296
      continue;
297
    }
298
    const audit = record.director_audit;
299
    if (!audit) continue;
300
    if (!audit.passed || !audit.infinex_fit.legal) {
301
      notes.push(`${record.candidate.channel}: Director read ${audit.primary_tempo} (${audit.primary_confidence.toFixed(2)}). ${audit.infinex_fit.reason || audit.voice_issues.join("; ") || "off-character read"}.`);
302
      notes.push(...audit.notes_for_actor.map((note) => `${record.candidate.channel}: ${note}`));
303
    }
304
    if (notes.length >= 10) break;
305
  }
306
307
  return {
308
    attempt,
309
    summary: notes.length > 0 ? notes.slice(0, 10).join("\n") : "All requested channels have a passing performance.",
310
    notes: notes.slice(0, 10),
311
  };
312
}
313
314
function preview(text: string): string {
315
  return text.replace(/\s+/g, " ").trim().slice(0, 120);
316
}
317

src/actor-director.ts

906 lines
1
import Anthropic from "@anthropic-ai/sdk";
2
import type { ReleaseCard } from "./card.js";
3
import type {
4
  Candidate,
5
  CandidateMovementReceipt,
6
  CandidateMovementScoreBeat,
7
  Channel,
8
  NotSaidFact,
9
} from "./generator.js";
10
import { INFINEX_VOICE } from "./voice/infinex.js";
11
import type { CharacterSpec, TempoName, WorkingAction } from "./voice/types.js";
12
import {
13
  buildActorMemoryPack,
14
  buildDirectorMemoryPack,
15
  type ActorMemoryPack,
16
  type DirectorMemoryPack,
17
  type MirodanSourceIndexEntry,
18
} from "./actor-memory.js";
19
20
type AnthropicCreateParams = Parameters<Anthropic["messages"]["create"]>[0];
21
22
export interface AnthropicMessagesClient {
23
  messages: {
24
    create: (params: AnthropicCreateParams) => Promise<{ content: Anthropic.Message["content"] }>;
25
  };
26
}
27
28
export interface ActorBeatPlan {
29
  verb: string;
30
  working_action: WorkingAction;
31
  physical_score: string;
32

33

34
  obstacle_local: string;
35
  shadow_move?: string;
36
}
37

export interface ActorTableWork {
39

41

42

45

46
}

53

54
}

}

export interface ActorDailyPages {
64

65

67

68
    left: string;
69
    right: string;
70

71
  }>;
72

87

export interface DirectorAuditResult {

  passed: boolean;

177

  motion_evidence: {
179
    weight: MotionEvidence;

181

182
    flow: MotionEvidence;
183
  };

188

189

190
    nearest_allowed_read?: string;
191
  };

193
  voice_issues: string[];
194

195

196

197

198
